PImmunityPer.description: Percentage Reduction applied after damage calculation (see formula design)
PImmunityPer.name: Physical Reduction

MImmunityPer.description: Percentage Reduction applied after damage calculation (see formula design)
MImmunityPer.name: Magic Reduction

fortune.description: Higher value = higher chance of max ATK critical.
fortune.name: Luck

ignorePDef.description: Physical Pierce: each ATK reduces target Physical DEF by N%
ignorePDef.name: Physical Pierce, ignores opponent's Physical DEF

ignoreMDef.description: Magic Pierce: each ATK reduces target Magic DEF by N%
ignoreMDef.name: Magic Pierce, ignores opponent's Magic DEF

nextAchieve.description: If set to 0, simply meet the Achievement condition. Otherwise, complete the configured Achievement first before obtaining this one.
nextAchieve.name: Post-Achievement

achieveType.description: 1=First Steps 2=Demon Slayer 3=Kill BOSS 4=Mount Level Up 5=Rank Promotion 6=Skill Cultivation 7=Obtain Medal
achieveType.name: Achievement Type

completeCondition.description: 1, Kill Monsters. 2, Collect Item. 3, Form Party. 4, Obtain Rank. etc.
completeCondition.name: Completion Condition

targetID.description: 0 = any target within type; specific ID = target in specific function block
targetID.name: Target ID

attackDistance.description: ATK Range (in grid units, 1 grid = 48 pixels)
attackDistance.name: ATK Range

perIgnorePDef.description: Physical Pierce Bonus, percentage of physical pierce
perIgnorePDef.name: Physical Pierce Bonus

perIgnoreMDef.description: Magic Pierce Bonus, percentage of magic pierce
perIgnoreMDef.name: Magic Pierce Bonus

maxStackNumber.description: 1=non-stackable, n(n>1)=stackable with max stack size n
maxStackNumber.name: Stack Limit

bindType.description: 0=Unbound 1=Bind on Pickup 2=Bind on Use or Equip
bindType.name: Bind Type

canUseIfDate.description: 1. Usable after x hours. 2. Usable after a specified date/time.
canUseIfDate.name: Allowed Use Time

expiredTime.description: 1. Item disappears after x hours. 2. Item disappears after a specified date/time.
expiredTime.name: Expiry Time

isNonPropertyItem.description: Whether item is "HP-bearing" (e.g. Equipment that can be refined/enhanced). 0=No, 1=Yes
isNonPropertyItem.name: Item Stats Variable

autoUsePriority.description: Used for auto-potion. 1 is lowest priority; higher value = higher priority.
autoUsePriority.name: Auto Use Priority

itemCDGroup.description: For potions etc.: when one in the group is used, all items in the same group enter cooldown.
itemCDGroup.name: CD Group ID

evaluateLevel.description: Some items may exceed the equip level by too much; this field is used for internal attribute evaluation.
evaluateLevel.name: Evaluation Level

useMaterialCount.description: Material count required for equipment enhancement/refining.
useMaterialCount.name: Material Use Count

succeedUpConsume.description: Yuanbao cost to increase success rate by 10%. Example: 100 = 100 Yuanbao for +10%, so +70% costs 700 Yuanbao.
succeedUpConsume.name: Success Rate Boost Cost

failedDownToLevel.description: Level dropped to on failure. 0=no enhancement, 1=+1, 2=+2, etc.
failedDownToLevel.name: Failure Level

dialogId.description: Opens a UI panel after use.
dialogId.name: Popup UI ID

skillAimType.description: 1=Targeted Skill (select target to cast) 2=Directional Skill (cast toward self's facing) 3=Grid (target a position on the map)
skillAimType.name: Skill Aim Type

skillHitAni.description: Hit animation played on target when the skill hits.
skillHitAni.name: Skill Hit Animation

skillCritAni.description: Critical hit animation played on target when the skill crits.
skillCritAni.name: Skill Crit Animation

skillUpperExp.description: Proficiency required to level up the skill.
skillUpperExp.name: Skill Upgrade Proficiency

skillCasterAni.description: 2=Default ATK action 6=Warrior ATK action 7=Mage/Taoist ATK action 1 8=Mage/Taoist ATK action 2
skillCasterAni.name: Skill Caster Action

stageLevel.description: Mount min 10 tiers; each tier has its own Icon and Model.
stageLevel.name: Rank

startLevel.description: Each tier has min 4 levels (0-3), corresponding to 1-3 stars.
startLevel.name: Star Level

rideMedicineMaxConsume.description: Max mount pills usable once when at the highest level.
rideMedicineMaxConsume.name: Mount Pill Max Cost

rideUpgradeSrcConsume.description: {Resource Code: Resource Quantity}, multiple entries separated by commas. 1=Merit 2=Mount EXP 3=Feather
rideUpgradeSrcConsume.name: Upgrade Resource Cost

probability.description: % chance for equipment success rate etc.
probability.name: % chance

smallName.description: Used mainly in minimap, Quest NPC, Monster short names.
smallName.name: Short Name

isPluckRealItem.description: Whether harvested items go into Bag. 0=No, 1=Yes
isPluckRealItem.name: Harvest Goes to Bag

pluckLevel.description: Level requirement for character to harvest.
pluckLevel.name: Harvest Level

pluckTime.description: Time required for a single harvest (unit: seconds).
pluckTime.name: Harvest Time

pluckItemAdscription.description: 1=Harvester's quest progress+1; 2=All party members' quest progress+1
pluckItemAdscription.name: Harvest Count Owner

pluckBehavior.description: 1=Harvest interrupted when player is attacked; 2=Harvest not interrupted when attacked
pluckBehavior.name: Harvest Display

pluckRefreshTime.description: When isPluckDisappear=2: respawn interval after disappearing (unit: seconds).
pluckRefreshTime.name: Harvest Respawn Time

storeLimitTime.description: Fill in end date; cannot purchase after expiry.
storeLimitTime.name: Shop Purchase Time Limit

canVipStrong.description: Can Transport to Boss via Power-Up UI
canVipStrong.name: Can Transport to Boss via Power-Up UI

attackAddPkValue.description: PK Value increase on player kill
attackAddPkValue.name: PK Value increase on player kill

wideRobotPer.description: Open World PK Bot Spawn Rate
wideRobotPer.name: Open World PK Bot Spawn Rate

lastReceiveCardTime.description: Last Monthly Card Revenue Claim Time
lastReceiveCardTime.name: Last Monthly Card Revenue Claim Time

lastGainLadderBoxTime.description: Last Celestial Ladder Chest Claim Time
lastGainLadderBoxTime.name: Last Celestial Ladder Chest Claim Time

lastGainDailyTaskBoxTime.description: Last Daily Quest Chest Claim Time
lastGainDailyTaskBoxTime.name: Last Daily Quest Chest Claim Time

firstPlayerBestRewardLevel.description: Player One Event Grand Prize Level
firstPlayerBestRewardLevel.name: Player One Event Grand Prize Level

playerLevelBagInfo.description: Player Level Welfare Gift Pack Info
playerLevelBagInfo.name: Player Level Welfare Gift Pack Info

bagUnlockCountViaPay.description: Magic Stone Used to Unlock Bag Slots
bagUnlockCountViaPay.name: Magic Stone Used to Unlock Bag Slots

lastHolidayScoreUpdateTime.description: Holiday Event Points Last Update Time
lastHolidayScoreUpdateTime.name: Holiday Event Points Last Update Time

LifeSoulLeftRefreshCntInfo.description: Destiny Soul Remaining Skill Points Info
LifeSoulLeftRefreshCntInfo.name: Destiny Soul Remaining Skill Points Info

ShengHunOpenRecharge.description: Divine Soul Gift Pack Unlock Recharge Amount
ShengHunOpenRecharge.name: Divine Soul Gift Pack Unlock Recharge Amount

StarEquipOpenRecharge.description: Starlight Gift Pack Unlock Recharge Amount
StarEquipOpenRecharge.name: Starlight Gift Pack Unlock Recharge Amount
